title: ALBANY WATER DISCOUNT PROGRAM - 211info
text: ALBANY REGIONAL OFFICE ALBANY WATER DISCOUNT PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a water service discount for low-income older adults and adults with disabilities who are City of Albany water customers. Does not provide funds to pay for water bills. 250 Broadalbin Street SW Suite 2A Albany, OR 97321 Eligibility: Age 60 and older and adults with documented disabilities. Income limits also apply. Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-noon and 1pm-5pm Email (541) 928-6335 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (541) 928-6335 Main phone Main phone (541) 928-6335 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information and to make an appointment FEES: None DOCUMENTS: Completed program application, proof of household income, and copy of water bill. Applications available at Albany CSC office. AREA SERVED: City of Albany SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 8am-noon and 1pm-5pm TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: On 2nd floor of Two Rivers Market. Walking distance from bus stop. Services: Discounted Water Service * Adults With Disabilities/Health Conditions Discounted Water Service * Older Adults Other Services Offered At This Location: COMMUNITY ECONOMIC DEVELOPMENT AND FINANCE - WIOA SCHOLARSHIPS COMMUNITY GROUPS AND GOVERNMENT/ADMINISTRATIVE OFFICES - COMMUNITY ACTION AGENCY HOUSING/SHELTER - COORDINATED ENTRY PROGRAM HOUSING/SHELTER - RENTAL ASSISTANCE UTILITIES - UTILITY ASSISTANCE If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. ALBANY REGIONAL OFFICE
